query: I need a comprehensive market analysis of the developer tools space — cover the top 20 players, their funding, market positioning, and where the industry is heading over the next 3-5 years. Include data from Gartner, Forrester, and any recent VC investment reports

Write a deep research report on the state of WebAssembly adoption in production — synthesize case studies from companies using WASM, performance benchmarks vs native code, ecosystem maturity analysis, and strategic recommendations for when to adopt it

Our CTO wants a competitive landscape analysis comparing Convex, Supabase, Firebase, and PlanetScale for our backend rewrite. Need comprehensive feature comparison, pricing analysis at our scale (50K DAU), community health metrics, and risk assessment for each

Create a strategic report on the AI code generation market — analyze GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, and emerging competitors. Cover adoption rates, developer satisfaction surveys, enterprise pricing trends, and predictions for 2027

I'm doing /plan Phase 2 research — produce a comprehensive analysis of event-driven architecture patterns in microservices, covering Kafka vs RabbitMQ vs NATS, with production case studies, failure mode analysis, and recommendations for our 100K events/sec throughput requirement

Write an industry deep-dive into the observability market — compare Datadog, Grafana Cloud, and New Relic across features, pricing, scalability, and OpenTelemetry support. Include customer migration stories and TCO analysis for a 500-node cluster

Research and synthesize the current state of edge computing for real-time AI inference — cover hardware options, cloud provider edge offerings, latency benchmarks, and case studies from autonomous vehicles and IoT deployments
Quick search: what's the current price of Bitcoin and what were Anthropic's latest announcements?
Find the official migration guide URL for ESLint's new flat config format
Search for recent blog posts about Bun 2.0 features and release date
Go to https://stripe.com/docs/api and extract the authentication section with all the code examples
Scrape https://openai.com/pricing and extract the per-token costs for each model tier
Build a structured company profile for Databricks — return JSON with founding year, funding rounds, valuation, employee count, and tech stack
Fix the TypeScript compilation error in src/services/auth.ts — it's complaining about missing type for the session token
Add unit tests for the rate limiter middleware in src/middleware/rateLimit.ts
